title: Update RunPod template to latest vLLM image

log.context: Update RunPod template to latest vLLM image

Done. Here's the summary:

- **Template `23fi8b2tik` (Pepe-70B-vLLM)** updated from `runpod/worker-vllm:stable-cuda12.1.0` (June 2024) to `runpod/worker-v1-vllm:v2.14.0` (March 2026).
- **Endpoint `o1b0e41cm3obbh` (pepe-70b-serverless)** re-saved to pick up the new template.
- The old `runpod/worker-vllm` Docker Hub repo stopped receiving updates in mid-2024. RunPod moved their vLLM worker images to `runpod/worker-v1-vllm`, which has releases through March 2026. v2.14.0 is the latest stable tag....(truncated)

log.msg: Pepe 70B deployed on RunPod serverless, proxy integrated
